name: Korro Bio, Inc.
business: Korro Bio is a biopharmaceutical company developing a new class of genetic medicines based on editing RNA to treat both rare and highly prevalent diseases. Its lead candidate, KRRO-121, targets hyperammonemia including urea cycle disorders and hepatic encephalopathy, and its pipeline includes a candidate for alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (AATD). The company has a research collaboration with Novo Nordisk that is currently paused.

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company with a mission to discover, develop and commercialize a new class of genetic medicines based on editing RNA, enabling the treatment of both rare and highly prevalent diseases.

catalysts.event: Regulatory filing to enable commencement of first-in-human trial for KRRO-121
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate a regulatory filing to enable commencement of a first-in-human trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Development candidate nomination for AATD program
catalysts.sentence: development candidate nomination expected in the second quarter of 2026
